title: Greens call for ban on US military using Prestwick Airport

sections.heading: Summary
sections.content: Greens call for ban on US military using Prestwick Airport. The US military should be banned from using Glasgow Prestwick Airport, the Scottish Greens have said ahead of a debate at Holyrood this week...

sourceReferences.citationText: serper-scottish-aviation – Greens call for ban on US military using Prestwick Airport
